fr_col: CASE WHEN e.SALARY >= 20000 THEN 'EXEC' WHEN e.SALARY >= 12000 THEN 'HIGH' WHEN e.SALARY >= 7000 THEN 'MID' ELSE 'LOW' END

fr_table: HR.EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN HR.DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID=e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN HR.JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID=e.JOB_ID
fr_col: CASE WHEN j.MAX_SALARY IS NULL THEN 'NO_JOB_RANGE' WHEN e.SALARY > j.MAX_SALARY THEN 'ABOVE_JOB_MAX' WHEN e.SALARY < j.MIN_SALARY THEN 'BELOW_JOB_MIN' ELSE 'IN_JOB_RANGE' END

fr_table: HR.EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN HR.DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID=e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN HR.JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID=e.JOB_ID
fr_col: CASE WHEN e.MANAGER_ID IS NULL THEN 'NO_MANAGER' ELSE 'HAS_MANAGER' END

fr_table: HR.EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN HR.DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID=e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN HR.JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID=e.JOB_ID
fr_col: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.DEPARTMENT_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC, e.EMPLOYEE_ID)

fr_table: HR.EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN HR.DEPARTMENTS d ON d.DEPARTMENT_ID=e.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN HR.JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID=e.JOB_ID
fr_col: DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY e.JOB_ID ORDER BY e.SALARY DESC)

fr_col: SUM(CASE WHEN e.SALARY >= 12000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

fr_table: HR.DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN HR.EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID=d.DEPARTMENT_ID
fr_col: SUM(CASE WHEN e.SALARY < 7000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

fr_table: HR.DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN HR.EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID=d.DEPARTMENT_ID
fr_col: CASE WHEN COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) = 0 THEN 'EMPTY' WHEN COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) >= 10 THEN 'LARGE' WHEN COUNT(e.EMPLOYEE_ID) >= 5 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'SMALL' END

fr_table: HR.DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN HR.EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID=d.DEPARTMENT_ID
fr_col: CASE WHEN AVG(e.SALARY) IS NULL THEN 'N/A' WHEN AVG(e.SALARY) >= 12000 THEN 'HIGH_PAY' WHEN AVG(e.SALARY) >= 7000 THEN 'MID_PAY' ELSE 'LOW_PAY' END

fr_table: HR.DEPARTMENTS d LEFT JOIN HR.EMPLOYEES e ON e.DEPARTMENT_ID=d.DEPARTMENT_ID
fr_col: CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT e.JOB_ID) >= 4 THEN 'DIVERSE' WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT e.JOB_ID) >= 2 THEN 'BALANCED' ELSE 'NARROW' END

fr_col: CAST(NULL AS NUMBER) / TRUNC(NVL(jh.END_DATE, SYSDATE) - jh.START_DATE)

fr_table: (CURRENT UNION ALL HISTORY) FROM HR.EMPLOYEES, HR.JOB_HISTORY
(CURRENT UNION ALL HISTORY) FROM HR.EMPLOYEES, HR.JOB_HISTORY
fr_col: CASE WHEN s.EVENT_END_DATE IS NULL THEN 'OPEN' ELSE 'CLOSED' END

fr_table: (CURRENT UNION ALL HISTORY) FROM HR.EMPLOYEES, HR.JOB_HISTORY
fr_col: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.EMPLOYEE_ID ORDER BY s.EVENT_DATE, s.EVENT_SOURCE)

fr_table: (CURRENT UNION ALL HISTORY) FROM HR.EMPLOYEES, HR.JOB_HISTORY
fr_col: LAG(s.JOB_ID) OVER (PARTITION BY s.EMPLOYEE_ID ORDER BY s.EVENT_DATE, s.EVENT_SOURCE)

fr_table: (CURRENT UNION ALL HISTORY) FROM HR.EMPLOYEES, HR.JOB_HISTORY
fr_col: LAG(s.DEPARTMENT_ID) OVER (PARTITION BY s.EMPLOYEE_ID ORDER BY s.EVENT_DATE, s.EVENT_SOURCE)

fr_col: CASE WHEN u.SOURCE_TAG = 'EMPLOYEES' THEN 'CURRENT_TRACK' ELSE 'HISTORY_TRACK' END

fr_table: (AA/BB/CC/EE CASE UNION ALL) FROM HR.EMPLOYEES, HR.JOB_HISTORY
fr_col: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY u.EMPLOYEE_ID, u.SOURCE_TAG ORDER BY u.EVENT_DATE)

fr_table: HR.EMPLOYEES e LEFT JOIN HR.JOBS j ON j.JOB_ID=e.JOB_ID
fr_col: CASE WHEN c.MIN_SALARY_DECIMAL IS NULL OR c.MAX_SALARY_DECIMAL IS NULL THEN 'JOB_RANGE_MISSING' WHEN c.MIN_SALARY_DECIMAL > c.MAX_SALARY_DECIMAL THEN 'JOB_RANGE_INVALID' ELSE 'JOB_RANGE_OK' END

fr_col: CASE WHEN c.AVG_SALARY_NUM IS NULL THEN 'N/A' WHEN c.AVG_SALARY_NUM >= 12000 THEN 'HIGH_PAY' WHEN c.AVG_SALARY_NUM >= 7000 THEN 'MID_PAY' ELSE 'LOW_PAY' END
